    1. Constant Field Values
      1. org.springframework.*

    org.springframework.*

    • org.springframework.cloud.netflix.eureka.EurekaClientConfigBean
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      DEFAULT_URL
      "http://localhost:8761/eureka/"
      public static final String
      DEFAULT_ZONE
      "defaultZone"
      public static final String
      PREFIX
      "eureka.client"

      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value

      DEFAULT_PREFIX
